bits.name: SET/CLR
bits.description: Set/clear control bit. Determines if bits written with a 1 get set or cleared.  Bits written with a zero are unchanged.

bits.name: BZERO
bits.description: Blitter logic  zero status bit (read only).

bits.name: BLTPRI
bits.description: Blitter DMA priority (over CPU micro) (also called "blitter nasty") (disables /BLS pin, preventing micro from stealing any bus cycles while blitter DMA is running).

registers.name: VPOSR
registers.function: Read vert most signif. bit (and frame flop)

registers.name: VHPOSR
registers.function: Read vert and horiz. position of beam

bits.name: SET/CLR
bits.description: Set/clear control bit. Determines if bits written with a 1 get set or cleared. Bits written with a zero are always unchanged.

registers.name: SERDATR
registers.function: Serial port data and status read

bits.name: OVRUN
bits.description: Serial port receiver overrun. Reset by resetting bit 11 of INTREQ .

bits.name: TSRE
bits.description: Serial port transmit shift register empty. Reset by loading into buffer.

bits.name: RXD
bits.description: RXD pin receives UART serial data for direct bit test by the microprocessor.

bits.name: STP-DB8
bits.description: Stop bit if LONG, data bit if not.

registers.name: DSKBYTR
registers.function: Disk data byte and status read

bits.name: DMAON
bits.description: Mirror of bit 15 (DMAEN) in  DSKLEN , ANDed with Bit09 (DMAEN) in  DMACON

bits.name: WORDEQUAL
bits.description: This bit true only while the DSKSYNC  register equals the data from disk.

bits.name: SET/CLR
bits.description: Set/clear control bit. Determines if bits written with a 1 get set or cleared. Bits written with a zero are always unchanged.

bits.name: DSKSYN
bits.description: Disk sync register ( DSKSYNC ) matches disk data

bits.name: SET/CLR
bits.description: Set/clear control bit. Determines if bits written with a 1 get set or cleared. Bits written with a zero are always unchanged.

bits.name: DSKSYN
bits.description: Disk sync register ( DSKSYNC ) matches disk data

registers.name: DSKPTH
registers.function: Disk pointer (high 3 bits, 5 bits if ECS)

registers.name: VPOSW
registers.function: Write vert most signif. bit (and frame flop)

registers.name: VHPOSW
registers.function: Write vert and horiz position of beam

bits.name: CDANG
bits.description: Copper danger mode. Allows Copper access to blitter if true.

registers.name: SERDAT
registers.function: Serial port data and stop bits write

bits.name: OVRUN
bits.description: Serial port receiver overrun. Reset by resetting bit 11 of INTREQ .

bits.name: TSRE
bits.description: Serial port transmit shift register empty. Reset by loading into buffer.

bits.name: RXD
bits.description: RXD pin receives UART serial data for direct bit test by the microprocessor.

bits.name: STP-DB8
bits.description: Stop bit if LONG, data bit if not.

registers.name: POTGO
registers.function: Pot port data write and start

registers.name: JOYTEST
registers.function: Write to all four joystick-mouse counters

registers.name: STREQU
registers.function: Strobe for horiz sync with VB and EQU

registers.name: STRVBL
registers.function: Strobe for horiz sync with VB (vert. blank)

registers.name: BLTAFWM
registers.function: Blitter first word mask for source A

registers.name: BLTALWM
registers.function: Blitter last word mask for source A

registers.name: BLTCPTH
registers.function: Blitter pointer to source C (high 3 bits)

registers.name: BLTCPTL
registers.function: Blitter pointer to source C (low 15 bits)

registers.name: BLTBPTH
registers.function: Blitter pointer to source B (high 3 bits)

registers.name: BLTBPTL
registers.function: Blitter pointer to source B (low 15 bits)

registers.name: BLTAPTH
registers.function: Blitter pointer to source A (high 3 bits)

registers.name: BLTAPTL
registers.function: Blitter pointer to source A (low 15 bits)

registers.name: BLTSIZV
registers.function: Blitter V size (for 15 bit vertical size)

registers.name: BLTSIZH
registers.function: Blitter H size and start (for 11 bit H size)

registers.name: SPRHDAT
registers.function: Ext. logic UHRES sprite pointer and data id

registers.name: DSKSYNC
registers.function: Disk sync pattern register for disk read

bits.name: SET/CLR
bits.description: Set/clear control bit. Determines if bits written with a 1 get set or cleared.  Bits written with a zero are unchanged.

bits.name: BZERO
bits.description: Blitter logic  zero status bit (read only).

bits.name: BLTPRI
bits.description: Blitter DMA priority (over CPU micro) (also called "blitter nasty") (disables /BLS pin, preventing micro from stealing any bus cycles while blitter DMA is running).

bits.name: MVBP1
bits.description: Match value for bitplane 1 collision NOTE:  Disabled bitplanes cannot prevent collisions.  Therefore if all bitplanes are disabled, collisions will be continuous, regardless of the match values.

registers.name: HSSTOP
registers.function: Horizontal line position for HSYNC stop

registers.name: HBSTRT
registers.function: Horizontal line position for HBLANK start

registers.name: HBSTOP
registers.function: Horizontal line position for HBLANK stop

registers.name: VSSTOP
registers.function: Vertical line position for VSYNC stop

bits.name: LPENDIS
bits.description: Ignore latched pen value on vertical pos read

bits.name: VARVBEN
bits.description: Use VBSTRT/STOP disable hard window stop

bits.name: CSYTRUE
bits.description: Polarity control for C sync pin

bits.name: VSYTRUE
bits.description: Polarity control for V sync pin

bits.name: HSYTRUE
bits.description: Polarity control for H sync pin

registers.name: HCENTER
registers.function: Horizontal position for Vsync on interlace

registers.name: DIWHIGH
registers.function: Display window -  upper bits for start, stop

bits.name: START
bits.description: = start Timer A, 0 = stop Timer A. This bit is automatically reset (= 0) when underflow occurs during one-shot mode.

bits.name: PBON
bits.description: = Timer A output on PB6, 0 = PB6 is normal operation.

bits.name: LOAD
bits.description: = force load (this is a strobe input, there is no data storage;  bit 4 will always read back a zero and writing a 0 has no effect.)

bits.name: INMODE
bits.description: = Timer A counts positive CNT transitions,

bits.name: SPMODE
bits.description: = Serial port=output (CNT is the source of the shift clock)
Serial port=input  (external shift clock is required)

bits.name: START
bits.description: = start Timer B, 0 = stop Timer B. This bit is automatically reset (= 0) when underflow occurs during one-shot mode.

bits.name: PBON
bits.description: = Timer B output on PB7, 0 = PB7 is normal operation.

bits.name: LOAD
bits.description: = force load (this is a strobe input, there is no data storage;  bit 4 will always read back a zero and writing a 0 has no effect.)

bits.name: PB7/DSKMOTOR
bits.description: Disk motor control (active low, latched per-drive)
